positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a glowing celestial creature—a cosmic fox spirit—perched atop a stylized mountain peak. The fox has long, ethereal fur that seems to trail starlight and nebulae. The background features geometric, overlapping mountain ranges and crescent moons, rendered in deep sapphire blues, cosmic indigos, and vibrant emerald greens. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, with the fox forming the central focal point. Use bold, clean silhouettes and high-contrast neon glow effects against a dark, midnight sky. Ideal for apparel, vector style, graphic novel aesthetics, highly detailed, intricate line work, symmetry, clean edges, perfect for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, dirty, grainy, artifacts, low detail, ugly, watermark, logo, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, gradient fade, clutter, copyright, trademark
